mapper.insert: INSERT INTO moondap.site_statistics (visit_date, visit_count) VALUES (#{visitDate}, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE visit_count = visit_count + 1
INSERT IGNORE INTO moondap.site_visit_log (visit_date, ip_address) VALUES (#{visitDate}, #{ipAddress})
INSERT INTO moondap.site_statistics (visit_date, participation_count) VALUES (#{visitDate}, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE participation_count = participation_count + 1
